title: viburnum tomentosum var. parvifolium
intro: Viburnum tomentosum var. parvifolium, also known as Japanese Snowball, is a shrub that belongs to the Adoxaceae family and is native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Viburnum tomentosum var. parvifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, making it a valuable resource for herbalists and natural health practitioners.
